0.text: Centriacinar nodules with a tree-in-bud appearance in the apical segment of the right upper lobe

1.text: Tree-in-bud opacities in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

2.text: Nodular consolidations in the apical segment of the right upper lobe

3.text: Nodular consolidations in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

4.text: Subcentimeter indeterminate nodules in both lungs
